// Auto-generated by Create_Continuous_4D_Moments_From_JSON.py
// Dimension mode: 4D_xB
// Fit set: Fit_Pars_from_3D_BC_RC_Bayesian
// Generated on 04-28-2026 17:57:20
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>
#include <string>
double rbf_kernel(double r, std::string kernel, double epsilon) {
    if (kernel == "thin_plate_spline") return r*r * std::log(r + 1e-12);
    if (kernel == "linear") return r;
    if (kernel == "multiquadric") return std::sqrt(1.0 + epsilon*epsilon*r*r);
    if (kernel == "gaussian") return std::exp(-epsilon*epsilon*r*r);
    if (kernel == "cubic") return r*r*r;
    return r; // fallback
}

1.87926741e-05, 2.11924764e-05, 3.51724009e-05, 3.44770321e-05, 2.45499455e-05, 7.88374962e-07, 1.34926173e-06, 1.52447667e-06, 1.41014192e-06, 1.07518117e-06, 5.24665987e-07, 2.10293235e-06, 3.55638041e-06, 3.79966434e-06, 3.26404060e-06, 2.07414663e-06, 6.59027680e-07, 3.97541033e-06, 6.71713268e-06, 7.01339275e-06, 5.43795862e-06, 3.04834510e-06, 6.12426445e-06, 1.07301856e-05, 1.01020257e-05, 7.16249415e-06, 8.76338891e-06, 1.45848483e-05, 1.32956097e-05, 6.53814479e-07, 1.10738475e-06, 1.31406125e-06, 1.34919601e-06, 1.14051310e-06, 4.92894834e-07, 1.47741279e-06, 2.60212447e-06, 2.98424226e-06, 3.03891143e-06, 2.44578563e-06, 1.34560830e-06, 2.50999664e-06, 4.47801909e-06, 5.06829239e-06, 4.73345047e-06, 3.60643050e-06, 1.68666442e-06, 3.78817737e-06, 6.45468546e-06, 7.19707488e-06, 6.08549371e-06, 4.36837769e-06, 5.51471164e-06, 9.57839668e-06, 9.47436803e-06, 7.67857167e-06};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_a = "thin_plate_spline";
const double epsilon_fit_par_a = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_a = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineA(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_a == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_a == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_a; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_a[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_a[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_a, epsilon_fit_par_a);
    }
    return sum;
}

// --- Fit_Par_B data ---
const int n_fit_par_b = 486;
const double centers_fit_par_b[486][4] = {
    {1.58001171e-01, 7.00000000e-01, 5.55000000e-01, 1.35000000e-01},

-1.41043358e-02, -1.58651712e-02, -6.53397127e-02, -1.84186009e-01, -2.49416864e-02, -8.13409939e-02, -8.64274229e-02, -1.22461719e-01, -1.52606594e-01, -3.18305320e-01, -1.31849910e-02, -3.65195335e-02, -4.87366767e-02, -8.49117305e-02, -1.49987355e-01, -3.02063214e-01, 5.08740146e-03, 2.13417726e-03, -2.44441074e-02, -1.13924227e-01, -1.69053497e-01, 2.78796231e-02, -8.65773521e-03, -6.01390481e-02, -1.20007301e-01, 3.45891905e-02, -6.04743297e-02, -8.40716758e-02, 2.09387517e-02, -4.20568982e-02, -7.26030490e-02, -9.74404550e-02, -1.20650740e-01, -2.29495686e-01, 4.14679317e-03, -1.62272506e-02, -3.19895077e-02, -4.85747676e-02, -7.63385207e-02, -1.88717836e-01, 2.23369014e-02, 1.41245024e-02, -1.96104803e-02, -3.95558839e-02, -8.63892687e-02, -1.56609603e-01, 1.88927191e-02, -2.18015348e-03, -3.68159420e-02, -6.78933463e-02, -1.30279559e-01, -3.22213951e-02, -1.09436370e-02, -4.74055051e-02, -1.03623542e-01};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_b = "gaussian";
const double epsilon_fit_par_b = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_b = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineB(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_b == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_b == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_b; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_b[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_b[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_b, epsilon_fit_par_b);
    }
    return sum;
}

// --- Fit_Par_C data ---
const int n_fit_par_c = 486;

-3.21883941e-02, 1.94999999e-02, -5.24694398e-03, -2.77184063e-02, -2.40270503e-02, -1.33827210e-02, -1.40304748e-02, 2.37624682e-02, -3.31598239e-02, -3.15985835e-02, -2.77672438e-02, 1.42098483e-02, 1.35294262e-03, 5.99999971e-02, -3.80548863e-03, -2.12780683e-02, 1.52030519e-03, -6.55786887e-03, 3.65364724e-02, -3.24096365e-03, 5.91292408e-03, -6.40807772e-03, 2.20213729e-02, 1.89718730e-02, -2.79594153e-02, 7.29974410e-03, -3.51875977e-03, -9.56609980e-04, 1.38351991e-02, 4.43110284e-03, 1.26411465e-03, -1.12381250e-02, 7.58197041e-03, -1.50831186e-02, -4.21769585e-02, 2.08749583e-02, -3.59352668e-02, 2.40437774e-02, 7.86357236e-03, -2.66291119e-02, -2.28731147e-02, -1.58919156e-02, -3.08077211e-02, 6.75792982e-02, -2.67642838e-03, -8.75240813e-03, 1.39688557e-02, -3.53407489e-02, -2.59505271e-02, -8.60145213e-03, 1.31697915e-02, 5.69589091e-03, 2.34079182e-02};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_c = "gaussian";
const double epsilon_fit_par_c = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_c = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineC(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_c == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_c == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_c; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_c[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_c[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_c, epsilon_fit_par_c);
    }
    return sum;
}

double ComputeSplineWeight(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT, double phi_h) {
    double phi_rad = phi_h * TMath::DegToRad();
    double A = ComputeSplineA(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    double B = ComputeSplineB(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    double C = ComputeSplineC(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    return A * (1.0 + B * std::cos(phi_rad) + C * std::cos(2.0 * phi_rad));
}
